since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.99%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +1.13% · Gold +1.25% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.08%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.20%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.20%, MRVL +4.05%, AMAT +3.94%, MU +3.62%, LRCX +3.60%. Laggards: EQIX -3.74%, CRM -1.84%, NOW -1.20%, NET -1.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.28% at $150.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
